title: Unity Software Historical Earnings Data and Quarterly Revenue Summary
text: Unity Software Quarterly Performance Summary (2024-2026): The company has demonstrated earnings surprises across consecutive quarters in 2024 and 2025. Q2 2024: Revenue beat $449M vs est $439M. Reported EPS loss of -$0.32 vs est -$0.42 (beat by $0.10). Q3 2024: Revenue $447M, beating estimates by 4.33%, with earnings surprise of 20.51%. Q4 2024: Revenue $457M, exceeding guidance, with EPS at -$0.15, better than estimated. Q1 2025: Revenue $435M (down 6% YoY), adjusted EPS beat estimates. Q1 2026: Revenue $508M (up 17% YoY), beating guidance of $480-490M. Strategic revenue reached $432M, up 35% YoY. Key Financial Metrics: Free cash flow improved significantly to $66M in Q1 2026 from $7M in Q1 2025. Adjusted EBITDA margins expanded to 27% from 19% YoY. Cumulative 2024 revenue was $1,813M vs $2,187M in 2023. Management has maintained guidance for GAAP profitability by Q4 2026.
